description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open on the Windows desktop. Using the order data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, create a new workbook featuring a Combo chart visualization. The chart must display Product Category on the X-axis, Sales as bars on the primary Y-axis, and Profit as a line on the secondary Y-axis to compare sales volume against profit across categories. Save the completed workbook as 'combo_analysis'.
